violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Pans of cooked green and baked beans in the walk in cooler were not dated.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Handles on the refrigerator and freezer in the kitchen need to be cleaned.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. The sanitizer in the dish machine tested at 0 ppm chlorine. Attempted to prime the machine, but no sanitizer was being dispensed out of the machine. Notified the establishment and they were going to wash dishes in three compartment sink.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. An open box of plastic containers and lids was stored on the floor in the back stockroom. An open box of plastic cups was stored on the floor in the furnace room.
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
